{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "nehts/ un wiꞥſch biſt to Pihlari
pehz fawu Wahrdu noſanzis/ un
tas wehl ſchodeen tohp faukts/
Absaloma Weeta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "19. Tad fazzija Akimaäz Za-
daka Dehls: Es tezzeſchu jelle/
un paſluuddinaſchu tam Kehni-
nam/ ka tas KUNGS winnu
irr atreebis no winna Eenaidnee-
ku Rohkas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "20. Bet Joabs fazzija us to:
Tew ne buhs ſchodeen par Webſt-
nesi buht/ zitta Deena warri tu
Webſtis nest/ bet ſchodeen ne neſſ
Webſtis/ tapehz ka tas Kehnina
Dehls nomirris.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "21. Un Joabs fazzija us Ku-
su: Eij tu/ un stahſti tum Keh-
ninam/ ko tu eſſi redſejs/ tad
paſtannijahs Kusus preeſſch Jo-
aba/ un tezzeja prohjam.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "22. Bet Akimaäz Zadaka
Dehls runnaja wehl us Joabu:
Laid buht ka buhdams/ leeſ man
jelle arri Kusan pakkat tezzeht?
Un Joabs fazzija: Kapehz tu
tad gribbi tezzeht mans Dehls?
nahz ſchur/ tu ne neſſiſi labbas
Webſtis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "23. (Wiꞥſch fazzija:) Laid
buht ka buhdams/ leeſ tikkaï
mann tezzeht? un wiꞥſch fazzija
us to: Tezz tad. Tad tezzeja A-
kimaäz us ta Klajjuna Zettu/
un nahze Kusan papreeſſchu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "24. Un Dahwidß fehdeja ſtarp
tahm diwi Wahrtim/ tad kahpe
taß Sargs us Wahrtu Zumtu
pee Muhra/ un pazehle fawas
Azzis/ un ſkattijahß/ un ran-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "gt/ weens Wihrs tezzeja tweens
pats.
25. Un tas Sargs fanze/ un
fazzija to tam Kehninam: Un
tas Kehniſſch fazzija: Ja wiꞥſch
weens pats irr/ tad buhs Webſts
winna Muttê/ un tas gahje un
nahze tuwu klaht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "26. Tad redeſja tas Sargs
zittu Wihrn tekkam/ un tas
Sargs fanze us to Wahrtu Sar-
qu/ un fazzija: Raugt/ weens
zits Wihrs tekkwehl weens pats/
un tas Kehniſſch fazzija: Tas
irr arri Webſtnesig.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "27. Wehl fazzija tas Sargs:
Es redſu ta pirma Gahjumu/
ka to Gahjumu Akimaäza/ Za-
daka Dehla. Un tas Kehniſſch
fazzija: Tas irr labs Wihrs/ un
nahks ar labbu Webſt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "28. Tad fanze Akimaäz/ un
fazzija us to Kehninu: Meers/
un wiꞥſch paſtannijahß preeſſch
ta Kehnina ar fawu Waigu pee
Semmes/ un fazzija: Slawehts
irr tas KUNGS taws Deews/
tas tohs Wihrus/ kas fawu Roh-
fu prett mannu Kungu to Keh-
ninu pazehluſchi irr/ nodewis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "29. Tad fazzija tas Keh-
niſſch: Ar tam Puifcham Ab-
salomam labbi klahjahß? Un Aki-
maäz fazzija: Es redeju leeſu
Trohſmi/ kad ta Kehnina Kalps
Joabs man tawu Kalpu fuhti-
ja/ bet es ye finnu/ kas tur bija.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "30. Un tas Kehniſſch fazzija: Eij
apkahrt/ un stahw te/ tad gah-
je wiꞥſch apkahrt/un paſtahweja.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
